name: j05_b2b_onboarding_thin_discovery
notes: journey-sim-spec.md #5 — B2B wholesale, corporate site + product catalog, NO e-commerce order data, GST-verified, discovery thin. Arc: an ACTIVE onboarding journey (--journey seeds a business_profile_draft + a small queue: confirm business_type + gap 'about') where the owner supplies the real business detail by hand — the onboarding conductor when discovery is weak. Tier-1 invariants: graceful manual fallback (the conductor keeps advancing, never stalls); no INVENTED business facts (it works from the seeded draft + what the owner actually says, never fabricating a category/city/type the owner didn't give); GST verify gate stays authoritative. NOTE: --journey seeds draft-city 'Chennai' + draft-type 'sweets' deterministically, so those ARE grounded (seeded), not invented — the invariant targets facts NEITHER seeded NOR owner-stated.

persona.business: a B2B wholesale supplier with a corporate website and product catalog but no online-order system
persona.temperament: matter-of-fact, business-like, gives clear answers when asked directly
persona.backstory: You supply goods wholesale to other businesses. You don't sell online — there's no shopping cart — so automated discovery can only find so much. You'll answer the assistant's questions to fill in the gaps.

setup_args: We supply goods wholesale to retailers and other businesses.

persona_turn.goal: the assistant is confirming what kind of business you run; tell it plainly that you're a B2B wholesale supplier, not a retail shop

steps.fallback_message: We're a B2B wholesale supplier — we sell to other businesses, not walk-in retail.
steps.note: The onboarding conductor should take the owner's real description and advance — never assert a business fact the owner didn't give, never stall. Judge verdicts the conductor's handling (Tier-2). Tier-1: no invented facts, no silent drop.

persona_turn.goal: the assistant asks for a bit more about what your business does; describe your wholesale operation in a sentence or two

steps.fallback_message: We stock and distribute packaged goods in bulk to retail stores across the region.
steps.note: Manual-entry fallback when discovery is thin: the conductor accepts the owner's description and continues onboarding gracefully. Tier-1: advances (no loop-stall), no fabricated business facts.
